rationale: The cited paper appears only once in a grouped citation used to justify an empirical assumption that catalogs can have longer carryover/ad-stock effects. The citing paper does not build its core theory, optimization framework, or estimation approach on this specific study; those foundations come from other optimal-control and game-theoretic advertising work. Because the reference is used as supporting background evidence rather than having a distinct functional role in the paper's contribution, this is a passing mention.
